---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero}

# Zak Kindl

::: {.hero-subtitle}
Research Associate · Sports Scientist
:::

::: {.hero-badges}
[R]{.badge-pill}
[Shiny]{.badge-pill}
[Quarto]{.badge-pill}
[Analysis]{.badge-pill}
[Data Viz]{.badge-pill}
:::
I analyze human performance data while trying to make complex information clear and actionable.

[View Projects →](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[About Me](about.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}

:::

---

## Featured Work

::: {.project-grid}

::: {.project-card}


### My Shiny App Title

A brief description of what this app does, who it's for, and what problem it solves. Keep it to 2–3 sentences.

::: {.card-tags}
[Shiny]{.tag} [Leaflet]{.tag} [reactive]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[Live App ↗](https://yourusername.shinyapps.io/your-app)
[Source](https://github.com/yourusername/your-app)
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}


### My Analysis Title

A brief description of the analysis, dataset used, and key finding or insight. Keep it to 2–3 sentences.

::: {.card-tags}
[ggplot2]{.tag} [dplyr]{.tag} [regression]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[Read Report →](projects/my-analysis.qmd)
[Source](https://github.com/yourusername/your-analysis)
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}


### My Script / Pipeline Title

A brief description of what this script does, how it runs, and the output it produces.

::: {.card-tags}
[data wrangling]{.tag} [purrr]{.tag} [readr]{.tag}
:::

::: {.card-links}
[See Code →](projects/my-script.qmd)
[Source](https://github.com/yourusername/your-script)
:::
:::

:::

[See all projects →](projects.qmd)
